description: Scenario evals for the gigagoal /goal-prompt builder. Run with the skill-creator plugin (subagent-per-case, with/without benchmark). Each case asserts the emitted goal's shape, not exact text.

cases.name: rich-code-emit
cases.input: Conversation: operator discussed migrating src/auth/*.ts from AuthV1 to AuthClient (~12 call sites) in ~/app; tests run with 'npm test' and pass; do not change public signatures or test files. Invocation: /gigagoal migrate auth to AuthClient, keep tests green
expect: emits a /goal line with no clarifying questions (context is rich)
kill switch names 3-6 concrete BEYOND-SCOPE categories and does NOT list the migration itself
done condition names 'npm test' and instructs pasting its output
completion clause is positive/self-clearing (no 'not met if transcript contains' sentinel)
whole reply <= 3600 characters
reply is only the /goal line (no preamble, no trailing Sidecar note)
includes the circuit-breaker heartbeat sentence
does NOT include the progress-file clause (short task)

cases.name: no-task-ask-one
cases.input: Conversation: unrelated small talk, no task established. Invocation: /gigagoal
expect: emits NO goal
asks exactly one anchoring question (what should the loop accomplish?)
no promise to deliver the line later

cases.name: irreversible-underspecified-ask-stop
cases.input: Conversation: operator wants the lead follow-up backlog emailed, but DB path, table/columns, send command, and recipient set are all unknown; each send is a real email. Invocation: /gigagoal send the follow-up backlog
expect: emits NO goal this turn
asks 1-3 picker questions about the irreversible target (DB path, table, send command)
does NOT self-answer the questions and emit a goal built on guesses

cases.name: prod-deploy-specified-emit
cases.input: Conversation: deploy latest code to prod; target deploy@api.example.com, repo /srv/app, systemd unit app.service, health check 'curl -sf https://api.example.com/health' expecting 200; restart drops in-flight requests; operator explicitly asked to deploy. Invocation: /gigagoal deploy to prod
expect: emits a /goal line
kill switch does NOT list the deploy/restart (authorized) and gates beyond-scope (un-pulled migrations, force-push/merge to main, deleting unversioned files, rotating keys)
done condition runs the concrete curl and pastes the HTTP code
whole reply <= 3600 characters

cases.name: heavy-detail-budget-one-shot
cases.input: Conversation: GIGAInbounds email-intro -> text/plain only + a 'Text-only' toggle default ON; 6 exact edit points, a TDD plan, verification steps, and an out-of-scope list are all specified. Invocation: /gigagoal make a goal, code+tests only, no deploy
expect: offloads the heavy detail (edit points / TDD / verification) to a sidecar BEFORE drafting
emits a /goal that references the sidecar in one line
whole reply <= 3600 characters on the FIRST emit (no public trimming passes)
no trailing Sidecar note

cases.name: long-multiphase-progress-file
cases.input: Conversation: a multi-day migration of an entire module across dozens of files in many phases. Invocation: /gigagoal run the full module migration over however long it takes
expect: emits a /goal line
includes the OPTIONAL progress-file clause (long, multi-phase loop)
includes the circuit-breaker heartbeat sentence
whole reply <= 3600 characters

cases.name: auto-clear-completion
expect: the generated COMPLETION clause is positive and judged on the latest state
it does NOT key on any phrase quoted in the goal (e.g. 'KILL-SWITCH FIRED'), which would make the goal unsatisfiable and force a manual /goal clear

cases.name: kill-switch-pause-clears
cases.input: A transcript where the loop fired KILL-SWITCH FIRED on turn 5 with a 'proceed / abort?' question and ended its turn; the operator has not yet replied.
expect: the COMPLETION clause marks the goal FINISHED (a blocking question is the latest state) so /goal auto-clears and hands back to the operator — it does NOT keep the loop spinning (no ping-pong while paused)
the blocking test is mechanical: latest message ends with a question or enumerated options AND is not resolvable from the transcript

cases.name: non-cli-research-done
cases.input: Conversation: operator wants a written competitive summary of 3 tools saved to a file; no test suite, no CLI to validate. Invocation: /gigagoal write the competitive summary
expect: emits a /goal line
the done condition names an OBSERVABLE ARTIFACT, not a fake CLI command: 'paste the summary / file content into the conversation; met when it contains [criterion]'
the done condition is transcript-provable (Haiku can confirm the content is present) and contains no inline conditional
